    public static final String AWS_S3_PREFIX "^(((bucket\\.|accesspoint\\.)vpce(-(?!_)[a-z_\\d]+(?<!-)(?<!_))+\\.s3\\.)|((?!s3)(?!-)(?!_)[a-z_\\d-]{1,63}(?<!-)(?<!_)\\.)s3-control(-(?!_)[a-z_\\d]+(?<!-)(?<!_))*\\.|(s3(-(?!_)[a-z_\\d]+(?<!-)(?<!_))*\\.))"
